case_title: FRED HATTER VS. SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF DEPARTMENT

docket_entries.description: NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY REQUESTS & MOTION FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE, TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $350 SHALL BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-11-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2008 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT FURTHER ORDERS WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE CHAN. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating & Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf Fred Hatter
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted AS FOLLOWS: Defendant City and County of San Francico's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Written Discovery Requests & Motion For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for statement of damages is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $350 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
